title: QOL-ify
description: The ultimate quality of life pack.
body: ## Built on Performium Harnessing the power of Performium and Fabric, **QOL-ify** offers a wide range of quality-of-life features while preserving performance and resources. [Get Performium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performium-was-taken) ## Enhancements **QOL-ify** enhances your Minecraft experience with a variety of quality-of-life improvements. - Shader Support - In-Game Shader/Resouce Pack Browser - Essential Mod - Dynamic Zoom - Real-time mapping - Optimized mouse and client controls - Connected Textures - Enhanced Models - Music Connections (Spotify, Apple Music...) - Extreme performance enhancements - Voice Chat - Sound Physics - Various HUD improvements ## World Sharing With the power of Essential mod, easily create your own Minecraft server in-game, **in your own world!** ## Compatibility **QOL-ify** is compatible with Minecraft versions 1.21+ and has been tested with the Modrinth App, Prism Launcher, and ATLauncher. It's always advised to use the latest version of **QOL-ify** to get the best experience. ## Version/Naming Convention #### v[ModpackVersion]-[Stage]+[BuildNumber] **Example:** - `v1.0.0-Alpha+1` — First alpha build of version 1.0.0 - `v1.0.0-Beta+3` — Third beta build of version 1.0.0 - `v1.0.0-Release+1` — First stable release of version 1.0.0 #### Breakdown: - **v[ModpackVersion]** → Modpack version (follows semantic versioning: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH) - **[Stage]** → Alpha, Beta, or Release - **[BuildNumber]** → Tracks builds within each stage ## Community Join our growing community to share your experiences, get the latest updates, and connect with other players who are also enjoying **QOL-ify**. Follow us on social media and stay engaged with the latest news and events. ## Feedback We value your feedback! If you have any suggestions or encounter any issues, please let us know. Your input helps us improve **QOL-ify** and make it the best quality-of-life modpack for Minecraft. ## Support For any issues or support, join our [Discord Server](https://discord.membercat.com). ## Installation (Modrinth App) 1. Download and install the Modrinth app 2. Login with your Minecraft account 3. Select "Browse" on the left side 4. Search for "QOL-ify" 5. Select and download the first option # Support / Credits [](https://membercat.com) This project is part of **Membercat Studios** by KasaiSora and has been created by: - **maybeizen**: Development To report an issue, receive support, or give your feedback, join our [Discord Server](https://dc.kasai.gg).
